headline: Should Upgraded EPS Forecasts and Revenue Momentum Require Action From McKesson (MCK) Investors?
summary: In recent days, analysts have raised earnings estimates for McKesson, highlighting its consistent outperformance versus consensus EPS expectations and pointing to continued revenue expansion in pharmaceutical distribution. This wave of positive revisions underscores how McKesson’s execution in its core distribution business is influencing perceptions of its longer-term earnings power. We’ll now examine how these upgraded earnings expectations and McKesson’s consistent EPS outperformance...
